# Code Owners

This file defines who needs to review changes to specific parts of the codebase.

# Repository owner approves all changes
* @RyneHuang

# Backend changes require backend review
backend/** @RyneHuang

# Frontend changes require frontend review
frontend/** @RyneHuang

# Documentation changes
*.md @RyneHuang
docs/** @RyneHuang

# Configuration changes
.github/** @RyneHuang
*.yml @RyneHuang
*.yaml @RyneHuang

# Dependencies
requirements.txt @RyneHuang
package.json @RyneHuang
package-lock.json @RyneHuang
